Package org.eventb.ui.manipulation

Class ElementManipulationFacade

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.ui.manipulation.ElementManipulationFacade
public class ElementManipulationFacade extends Object
Static high-level methods to headlessly manipulate the rodin model from outside the Event-B editor.
Since:
2.4

    Constructors

    Description

    Method
    Description
    static void
    autoRenameElements(IEventBRoot root, IInternalElementType<?> type)
    Method to rename automatically all the elements of the given root of a given type with the prefix set for this element type through the preferences.

    changeAttribute(IInternalElement element, IAttributeManipulation manip, String value)
    Changes the value of a given element in an atomic step (operation) which is added to the Event-B UI history.

    Changes the value of a given element in an atomic step (operation) which is added to the Event-B UI history.

  • Method Details

    • getRodinFileUndoContext

      public static org.eclipse.core.commands.operations.IUndoContext getRodinFileUndoContext(IEventBRoot root)
      Method to retrieve the IUndoContext associated to the given root.

    • getHistory

      public static IRodinHistory getHistory()

    • getRodinHandleTransfer

      public static org.eclipse.swt.dnd.Transfer getRodinHandleTransfer()

    • copyElementsToClipboard

      public static void copyElementsToClipboard(Collection<IRodinElement> elementsToCopy, org.eclipse.swt.dnd.Clipboard clipboard)
      Copies both names and handles of the given elements in a clipboard build with the given display.
      Parameters:
      elementsToCopy - the elements to copy
      clipboard - the clipboard to get the copied elements

    • autoRenameElements

      public static void autoRenameElements(IEventBRoot root, IInternalElementType<?> type)
      Method to rename automatically all the elements of the given root of a given type with the prefix set for this element type through the preferences.

    • copyElements

      public static void copyElements(IRodinElement[] handleData, IRodinElement target, IRodinElement nextSibling)
      Perform a copy operation through the undo history.

    • createElementGeneric

      public static void createElementGeneric(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, IInternalElement sibling)
      Creates a generic element from a given type in the given parent before a given sibling that shall have the same type. The operation is added in the Event-B UI history.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent of the element created
      type - the type of the element created
      sibling - the next sibling of the created element

    • changeAttribute

      public static void changeAttribute(IInternalElement element, IAttributeManipulation manip, String value)
      Changes the value of a given element in an atomic step (operation) which is added to the Event-B UI history.
      Parameters:
      element - the element owner of the attribute
      manip - attribute manipulation of the element
      value - the string corresponding to the new value of the element
      Since:
      3.0

    • changeAttribute

      public static void changeAttribute(IInternalElement element, IAttributeValue value)
      Changes the value of a given element in an atomic step (operation) which is added to the Event-B UI history.
      Parameters:
      element - the element owner of the attribute
      value - the new value of the element

    • deleteElement

      public static boolean deleteElement(IInternalElement[] elements, boolean force)
      Deletes the given elements in an atomic step (operation) which is added to the Event-B UI history.
      Parameters:
      elements - the internal elements to delete
      force - a flag controlling whether underlying resources that are not in sync with the local file system will be tolerated (same as the force flag in IResource operations).
      Returns:
      true if elements have been deleted.

    • deleteElement

      public static boolean deleteElement(IInternalElement element)
      Deletes the given element in an atomic step (operation) which is added to the Event-B UI history.
      Parameters:
      element - the internal element to delete
      Returns:
      true if element has been deleted.

    • move

      public static void move(IInternalElement targetParent, IInternalElement element, IInternalElement nextSibling)
      Create an Operation to move an element in an atomic step (operation) which is added to the Event-B UI history.

      After execute and redo :

      • movedElement.getParent() equals newParent
      • movedElement.getNextSibling() equals newSibling

      After undo :

      • movedElement.getParent() equals oldParent
      • movedElement.getNextSibling() equals oldSibling
      Parameters:
      element - the element to move
      targetParent - the new parent of moved element
      nextSibling - the new next sibling element of moved element

    • isReadOnly

      public static boolean isReadOnly(IInternalElement element)
      Tells if the given element is read-only.
      Parameters:
      element - the current element
      Returns:
      true iff the element is read-only

    • checkAndShowReadOnly

      public static boolean checkAndShowReadOnly(IRodinElement element)
      Returns whether the given element is read only. Additionally, if the given element is read only, this method informs the user through an info window.
      Parameters:
      element - an element to check
      Returns:
      true iff the given element is read only
      Since:
      3.0
